title: cremanthodium trilobum
intro: Cremanthodium trilobum, also known as the three-lobed cremanthodium or three-lobed daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the mountainous regions of China and Tibet. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Cremanthodium trilobum are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestion, among other health benefits. Cremanthodium trilobum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine.
